comments: Approved based on direct verification of commit 0267d67. git show reports exactly three changed paths: tasks/v0.7-m2-unified-model.md, tasks/v0.7-m2-execution-result.json, and tasks/v0.7-m2-result-review-packet.json, which matches the execution result and stays within the contract's allowed implementation file plus allowed artifacts. The markdown explicitly answers all six M2 directive questions via sections covering artifact taxonomy, standard task lifecycle, reviewer vs. gatekeeper, acceptance vs. evaluation, personal vs. team mode common core, and low cognitive load principle. No .agent-state/ migration files, no src/ changes, no MCP capability changes, and no workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json semantic changes are present in the commit.
